flashcards.back: A production with a dot (•) indicating the progress in recognizing that production during parsing.
An operation that adds all productions that could be recognized next given the current items in a state.
An operation that computes the next state when a particular grammar symbol is recognized.

flashcards.front: How does SLR resolve reduce actions?
flashcards.back: By using FOLLOW sets - reduce only when the lookahead is in the FOLLOW set of the non-terminal being reduced to.
A prefix of a right-sentential form that can appear on the stack of an LR parser.
